title: Thanksgiving with Friends and Family
summary:
After returning from our mini camping trip, my college roommate Aidan and his wife Rosie came to Tucson to stay with my family for Thanksgiving. It was great to see them both and we had a great time running, biking and chatting. Highlights of their visit included
  • Riding 'The Lemmon Drop' mountain bike trail, which made the trails in Boulder City look like child's play
  • Seeing the new Wicked movie with Helen, Aidan, Rosie and my mom, who insisted on getting the largest popcorn available (and of course getting a refill)
  • Having a lovely Thanksgiving dinner with all of our favorite dishes, followed by watching the new movie 'Eddington' (which received a thumbs sideways to thumbs down from all viewers that night).


-Colin
